Description: Verify ZC3676 is automatically suggested when ZC3339 added to GL and Umbrella is selected in New Business Domestic scope

8. Verify suggestion area for Umbrella
9. Navigate to Umbrella exposures screen

1. Submission created successfully
2. Submission initiated to Phoenix
3. User navigates to Line selection screen
4. Domestic scope is selected
5. Umbrella LOB is visible and selected
6. GL Exposures screen displays
7. ZC3339 exclusion is added to GL
8. Suggestion area shows ZC3676 as suggested exclusion
9. Umbrella exclusions screen displays with ZC3676 suggestion
